message.abstract:
<jats:title>Withdrawal statement</jats:title>
                <jats:p>medRxiv has withdrawn this preprint owing to lack of consent from all listed authors. Therefore, this work should not be cited as a reference for this project.</jats:p>
title: WITHDRAWN: What Risk Factors to Cause Long COVID and Its Impact on Patient Survival Outcomes when Combined with the Effect from Organ Transplantation in the Acute COVID
